violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the upstairs and downstairs kitchen was blocked by (pans). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

Food items prepared in the establishment sliced deli meat and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Grilled chicken breast was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Chicken was moved to a single layer baking sheet. Chicken was cooked thirty minutes prior. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the pizza prep unit and grill prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
The mop sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
The floor by the grill line is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
Ice condensate from the reach-in freezer was observe. Condensate drainage and other Non sewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
The ventilation system above the preparation area observed to have a large accumulation of dust. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023

Food contact surfaces of veggie cutter was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023

Ready to eat salads, were observed held at 61 degrees Fahrenheit at the 2 door reach-in unit. Ambient temperature of the unit was observed at 61 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Unit is out of service and will be replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023
A dead rodent was observed on a glue board at the preparation area. Per person in charge pest control is active 1X month. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair at the pizza preparation unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer, walk in cooler and walk-in freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023
Ice condensate from the reach-in freezer and walk-in freezer units were observe. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The floor and walls in the preparation area (basement) area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023

The ventilation hood system has an accumulation of grease that must be cleaned. PIC said that the hoods are scheduled to be cleaned next day of the inspection 10/18/2023. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The ventilation system about the preparation area observed to have a large accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
